svg.aria-label: Hydra Constellation poster: top band — constellation overlay with Hydra highlighted and three crown stars; center — Pentecost flower sigil with Immortal Red head, three Crown Teal petals (Executive, Forge, Garland), five Trigram Amber stub petals (legal-compliance, healthcare, sales-gtm, research-ds, customer-support), outer ring of eight I Ching trigrams; outermost — AgentSmith warden ring with N1-N10 fail-closed; bottom band — memory lemniscate looping episodic and semantic stores.
svg.title: Hydra Constellation
svg.desc: Poster integrating three motifs into a single vertical composition. Theme follows Garland creative-direction: Void Black background, Vellum text, Immortal Red constitution, Crown Teal crowns, Trigram Amber stubs and trigrams.

g.text: Hydra · 1,303 square degrees · three crowns · one covenant
episodic · semantic · eight cells · one continuity
